summary: I’m exploring whether non‑standard build targets should be standardized, noting that they’re mainly for distribution tools like shiv, not pip installs. I’m uncertain if developers will adopt them, and I’d love feedback from frontend teams on whether this effort is worthwhile.
important_uncertainty: I can't definitively say this one way or the other

phrase_candidates.text: I can't definitively say this one way or the other
I would love to get some feedback
Maybe I'm demanding too much within the constraints of the build ecosystem
